query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A close-up of a translucent surface obscured by vertical streaks of moisture and residue. A faint warm-toned vertical shape is visible near the center, seen through the obscured surface. A bright white horizontal band runs along the lower edge of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A highly abstract, detail-starved close-up of a weathered translucent surface obscured by vertical streaks of moisture and residue, where surfaces smear into ambiguity with virtually no resolving fine detail. A faint warm-toned vertical shape is visible near the center through the obscured plane, beneath flat, directionless lighting that collapses depth into a muted, washed-out gray field. A bright white horizontal band runs along the lower edge, the entire scene rendered as an indistinct study in tone and texture rather than a clearly identifiable subject.
